obligations.rule: URLs must not contain spaces or invalid characters.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies valid URLs must not include whitespace or invalid characters like '<' or '>'.
Requirement explicitly rejects URLs starting with 'mailto:'.

obligations.rule: URLs must not exceed the maximum allowed length unless validate_length is false.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies a default maximum length of 2084 unless validate_length is disabled.

test_groups.title: Basic URL validation without options
test_groups.rationale: Covers basic validation rules for URLs without any options, including invalid characters and 'mailto:' rejection.

test_groups.title: Maximum length validation with default options
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default maximum length constraint of 2084 characters.

test_groups.title: Fragment rejection with `allow_fragments: false`
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs containing fragments when `allow_fragments` is explicitly set to false.

test_groups.title: Query component rejection with `allow_query_components: false`
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs containing query components when `allow_query_components` is explicitly set to false.

test_groups.title: Authentication rejection with `disallow_auth: true`
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs containing authentication components when `disallow_auth` is explicitly set to true.

test_groups.title: Protocol requirement with `require_protocol: true`
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs without protocols when `require_protocol` is explicitly set to true.

test_groups.title: Port requirement with `require_port: true`
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs without ports when `require_port` is explicitly set to true.

test_groups.title: Protocol-relative URLs with `allow_protocol_relative_urls: true`
test_groups.rationale: Tests acceptance of protocol-relative URLs when `allow_protocol_relative_urls` is explicitly set to true.

test_groups.title: Invalid port numbers
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs with invalid port numbers, ensuring the port validation logic is exercised.

test_groups.title: Invalid characters in hostname
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs with invalid characters in the hostname, ensuring hostname validation logic is exercised.

test_groups.title: Empty hostname with `require_host: false`
test_groups.rationale: Tests acceptance of URLs with empty hostnames when `require_host` is explicitly set to false.

test_groups.title: Invalid protocols with `require_valid_protocol: true`
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs with protocols not in the allowed list when `require_valid_protocol` is true.

test_groups.title: Encoded authentication rejection with `require_protocol: false`
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs with encoded authentication components when `require_protocol` is false.

test_groups.title: Invalid IPv6 formats
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of URLs with invalid IPv6 formats, ensuring the `wrapped_ipv6` regex is exercised.
